candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component within the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total', not a separate same-level expense to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it is not relevant for COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The explicit depreciation row sits within the cost of revenues breakdown, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the explicit SG&A-related D&A line, but it is a component of the selected parent row 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. The SG&A total matches the sum of its displayed components, indicating depreciation is already embedded.
This is COGS-related, not SG&A-related, so it is not relevant for XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. The explicit SG&A depreciation row is included within that total, so it should not be added separately.
